name: Sinus CT
description: CT of the paranasal sinuses for sinus disease evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the paranasal sinuses without contrast was performed.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Frontal Sinuses
sections.content: Frontal sinuses [are aerated / clear / no fluid / no mucosal thickening].

sections.name: Maxillary Sinuses
sections.content: Maxillary sinuses [are aerated / clear / no fluid / no mucosal thickening]. Ostia are patent.

sections.name: Ethmoid Sinuses
sections.content: Ethmoid air cells [are aerated / clear / no fluid / no mucosal thickening].

sections.name: Sphenoid Sinus
sections.content: Sphenoid sinus [is aerated / clear / no fluid / no mucosal thickening].

impression:
1. No acute sinusitis.
2. Paranasal sinuses are clear.
